arts.ttl: Conceiçao: “You cannot work at Milan if, after winning a Supercoppa, you feel satisfied”
arts.sum: AC Milan's new manager Sergio Conceicao is keeping his feet firmly on the ground following the team's Supercoppa Italiana triumph in Saudi Arabia. The Portuguese coach is already focused on the upcoming Serie A match against Cagliari and the challenge of securing Champions League qualification. The post Conceiçao: “You cannot work at Milan if, after winning a Supercoppa, you feel satisfied” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: “You try in every way” – Manager on work to sign Marcus Rashford from Manchester United
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been linked to multiple clubs in the January transfer widow, with Manchester United seemingly ready to part ways with their homegrown attacker. AC Milan and Borussia Dortmund have been repeatedly linked this week, although German reports pretty much dismissed the idea of serious interest from BVB.
